unmapped.human_action: Hold at observing. Commission a manual venue audit that separates true biomarker/diagnostic-first longevity practices from med-spas and IV lounges that simply added the label, and watch for any ground-level chatter (Reddit, forums, patient reviews) that either corroborates or deflates the rebrand story.
unmapped.machine_action: Re-poll Places and Trends for the longevity-clinic category in 14-21 days; escalate toward promote only if support_count rises to 3+ sources or Reddit/forum corroboration appears; otherwise leave at observing.
unmapped.methodology_footer: Sourced via internal Places-API venue density and Google Trends search-velocity tracking for Metro Vancouver; composite scores reflect signal strength across source types, not confirmed market size.
unmapped.uncertainty: Two source types only, no Reddit corroboration, and no manual audit separating true diagnostic-first longevity practices from relabeled med-spas; could be a Vancouver-specific naming fad rather than a national repricing.

signals: {'type': 'places_geo_density', 'description': '113 venues across Metro Vancouver now categorized under longevity-clinic and adjacent labels (biomarker panels, concierge health screening, hormone/metabolic optimization, membership-based protocols)', 'strength': 'moderate', 'weakness': 'category purity unknown without manual audit; count conflates med-spas and IV-therapy lounges with dedicated biomarker/longevity practices'}

{'type': 'google_trends', 'description': "41 tracked data points showing 'longevity clinic' consolidating as the dominant search term over 'anti-aging clinic', 'wellness clinic', and 'hormone clinic'", 'strength': 'moderate', 'weakness': 'does not distinguish patient-intent searches from media curiosity or general awareness; no Reddit corroboration captured'}
original_issue.thesis: "Longevity clinic" is consolidating as a label ahead of any regulatory definition, and the shift is showing up independently in venue signage and search behavior across Metro Vancouver — a vocabulary change that lets existing med-spa and wellness operators reprice as diagnostic, membership-based medicine without changing what they actually do inside.
original_issue.uncertainty: Two source types only, no Reddit corroboration, and no manual audit separating true diagnostic-first longevity practices from relabeled med-spas; could be a Vancouver-specific naming fad rather than a national repricing.

title: The Rebrand That Comes With a Blood Panel
summary: "Longevity clinic" is consolidating as a label ahead of any regulatory definition, and the shift is showing up independently in venue signage and search behavior across Metro Vancouver — a vocabulary change that lets existing med-spa and wellness operators reprice as diagnostic, membership-based medicine without changing what they actually do inside.

claims.statement: "Longevity clinic" is consolidating as a label ahead of any regulatory definition, and the shift is showing up independently in venue signage and search behavior across Metro Vancouver — a vocabulary change that lets existing med-spa and wellness operators reprice as diagnostic, membership-based medicine without changing what they actually do inside.
claims.falsification: If venue counts plateau, if search vocabulary reverts toward generic 'med spa' or 'anti-aging' framing, or if a manual audit shows the 113-venue count is mostly relabeled spas with no added diagnostic service, downgrade or archive.

render.heading: Thesis
render.body: "Longevity clinic" is consolidating as a label ahead of any regulatory definition, and the shift is showing up independently in venue signage and search behavior across Metro Vancouver — a vocabulary change that lets existing med-spa and wellness operators reprice as diagnostic, membership-based medicine without changing what they actually do inside.

render.heading: Signals
render.body:
sig_1: 113 venues across Metro Vancouver now categorized under longevity-clinic and adjacent labels (biomarker panels, concierge health screening, hormone/metabolic optimization, membership-based protocols) (strength: moderate)

sig_2: 41 tracked data points showing 'longevity clinic' consolidating as the dominant search term over 'anti-aging clinic', 'wellness clinic', and 'hormone clinic' (strength: moderate)

render.heading: What would falsify it
render.body: If venue counts plateau, if search vocabulary reverts toward generic 'med spa' or 'anti-aging' framing, or if a manual audit shows the 113-venue count is mostly relabeled spas with no added diagnostic service, downgrade or archive.
